title: Clinical State Fragmentation Blocks Execution
scenario: The clinical workflow depends on multiple state records that have become fragmented across systems before execution.
initial_state: The clinical state was unified during authorization.
state_transition: The required clinical state becomes fragmented before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires preservation of a coherent clinical state object.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because fragmented clinical state prevents integrity-preserving execution.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when clinical state fragmentation breaks integrity preservation.
clinical_action: Execute treatment under fragmented clinical state
